ddls:
CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_signature" TEXT /* Signature of the method */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Security rating of the method */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the security rating */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the method was last updated */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module where the method is located */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the method was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the method */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the method (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the module belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the module was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the module was last updated */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer of the module */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the module (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the rating (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* Reliability level of the source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, security analyst, project manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., development, security, management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method version */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the method */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_versions_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the method */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the method was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_access_logs_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_ratings_history" (
  "rating_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating history entry */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method the rating belongs to */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rating */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the rating */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the rating */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was assigned */,
  "rated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_ratings_history_rated_by FOREIGN KEY ("rated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_ratings_history_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_ratings_history_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_ratings_history_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
